title: SEC & NGX Meeting
description: Executive Commissioner  Operations, Securities and Exchange Commission  Mr Dayo Obisan, Director General SEC Mr Lamido Yuguda and  CEO Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX) Mr Temi Popoola during a Meeting
html: Executive Commissioner  Operations, Securities and Exchange Commission  Mr Dayo Obisan, Director General SEC Mr Lamido Yuguda and  CEO Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX) Mr Temi Popoola during a Meeting between The SEC and NGX in Lagos at the weekend.
